ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.DeveloperName = 'PHOCSFoodLabTestRequisition' && Establishment__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'DrinkingWaterSystem' && Establishment__r.RecordTypeName__c != 'DrinkingWaterSourceIntake' && (Establishment__r.RecordTypeName__c = 'Facility' && ( ISPICKVAL(Establishment__r.Type, 'Sewerage') || ISPICKVAL(Establishment__r.Type, 'Child Care') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Establishment is not eligible for this Lab Test Requisition
